name: 细胞
subject: science
domain_name: 生命科学 / Life Sciences / Life Sciences
curriculum_points: MS-LS1-1. Conduct an investigation to provide evidence that living things are made of cells; either one cell or many different numbers and types of cells.
MS-LS1-2. Develop and use a model to describe the function of a cell as a whole and ways parts of cells contribute to the function.
